findings.description: Potential exfiltration instructions detected in tool description.
findings.details: Review tool descriptions for phrases that instruct the model to move data outside the intended scope.

findings.description: Server '@supabase/mcp-server-postgrest' is from an unverified source outside @modelcontextprotocol.
Package '@supabase/mcp-server-postgrest' looks suspiciously like trusted server 'mcp-server-postgresql' (character substitution/omission).
findings.details: Verify you meant to install this package and not 'mcp-server-postgresql'.
